name: Meningococcal group A polysaccharide
description: Meningococcal group A polysaccharide is group-specific polysaccharide antigens extracted and purified from *Neisseria meningitidis* serogroup A. *N. meningitidis* is a bacteria that causes endemic and epidemic diseases including meningitis and meningococcemia. It is subcutaneously administered as an active immunization against the invasive meningococcal disease caused by the serogroup A.
